name: KRL Tanjung Priok Line Schedule Candidate (Local Only)
source_name: KAI Commuter official website schedule API
license: schedule waived for local use; OSM geometry ODbL
limitations: Schedule reuse waived by the owner for local use only.
Station coordinates and track geometry from OpenStreetMap (ODbL).
Source is website API schedule JSON, not a GTFS feed.
Only full Tanjung Priok to Jakarta Kota terminal services are included.
Intermediate stop times scaled from a representative official train schedule.
